description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Passenger CI tests that runs on push to stable-* and feature/* branches and on pull requests to those branches. The workflow has five jobs: cxx for C++ unit tests, integration for integration tests, language for unit tests in multiple languages, homebrew_packaging for Homebrew packaging unit tests, and source_packaging for source packaging unit tests. Each job checks out the repository, sets up Ruby, and runs tests with Docker or natively depending on the OS.
